title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit**
*2027*
The climactic final battles in The Lord of The Rings come alive on a epic board.
![The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_f23d8ae0.jpg)

2. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_c13278da.png)

3. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_ee749db5.png)

4. **Gods & Mortals**
*2026*
A rare blend of stock trading and area control set in Homeric Greece.
![Gods & Mortals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_0d67e527.jpg)

5. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_08958df6.png)

6. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_946dc236.jpg)

7. **Star Wars: The Queen's Gambit**
*2000*
Recreate the climactic scenes from Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace.
![Star Wars: The Queen's Gambit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_430791df.jpg)

8. **The Great Sea**
*2026*
Construct biremes, fortify trade routes, and control the ancient temples.
![The Great Sea](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_0590a7a9.png)

9. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_373ecc65.jpg)

10. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_fbc7140c.jpg)

11. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2026*
Investigate the mysteries of Arkham while cosmic horrors stand in your way.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_3591abc0.png)

12. **Voidfall**
*2023*
Repel the Voidborn and restore Domineum in this space themed, heavy Euro.
![Voidfall](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_4a8e747a.jpg)

13. **Slay the Spire: The Board Game**
*2024*
Craft a unique deck, discover powerful relics, and Slay the Spire together!
![Slay the Spire: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_97339047.png)

14. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_3db4dfc2.jpg)

15. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_f14ebf2f.png)

16. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_b00b7072.jpg)

17. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_1d81ab70.jpg)

18. **Concordia: Special Edition**
*2027*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia: Special Edition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_ea514c45.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_e6ded805.png)

20. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2016*
Investigate the horrors of Arkham while courting cosmic doom.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_150ac1e8.jpg)

21. **Towers of Sifnos**
*2026*
Raise the beacon towers and muster the troops to defend Sifnos.
![Towers of Sifnos](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_ee5a7b25.jpg)

22. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_a9c260c8.jpg)

23. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_966bc23b.jpg)

24. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_f29f655b.jpg)

25. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*2025*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_c39bab07.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*15 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_cb06a96b.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*23 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_32243420.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*18 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_983b620e.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*51 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_50eaf4c4.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*87 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_3256bcd1.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*11 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_f11343cb.png)

7. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*40 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_233f83ed.jpg)

8. **Azul**
*101 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_19fd4822.png)

9. **Terraforming Mars**
*114 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_fbed4222.jpg)

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*33 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_e9ab8837.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*30 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_9d1a75eb.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*56 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_3fc33f78.jpg)

13. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*63 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_2ddea408.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*16 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_26896b51.jpg)

15. **Faraway**
*23 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_b219faba.png)

16. **Sky Team**
*30 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_953d0178.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*2 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_77e82e68.jpg)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*2 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_2f34c473.png)

19. **The Gang**
*9 months on the list*

![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_5f0400e7.jpg)

*9 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.

Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.

22. **Carcassonne**
*273 months on the list*

![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-03/toplist/bgg_2baf46c4.jpg)

Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.

*16 months on the list*
